title: Random totems
description: This simple resourcepack replaces the totem of induing, if renamed, with memes and something else.
body:
Optifine or CIT resewn is required
This simple resourcepack replaces the totem of induing, if renamed, with memes and something else. In the future, the resourcepack will be supplemented.You need to unpack the archive into a folder with resourcepacks, after which you will have 2 resource packs for custom sound and with renaming.
The following renames are now available: putin,cobblestone,gigachad,kefirruz,smurfcat
